mission_title: The Test of the Leaden Crown

key_decisions: Lammis Gets the Forge Artifact and decides that Iron Fang Consortium does not need it. It is to powerful. She Decides to take it to the Wizards Tower instead and insists on Asylum.
loose_threads: Lammis is left stuck in the Wizards tower, To afraid to step out into the open where the Iron Fang Consortium could catch her.

key_decisions:
• The Undercity's stability is preserved, and the people breathe a collective sigh of relief.
    • The Wizards Tower gains a valuable ally in the Wardens of Ash, who offer assistance in future endeavors.
notable_moments: Eleanor Reed of The Wizards Tower once again does the impossible, and stabilizes a rift. Gaining a shortcut between three different warrens areas. If you dare traverse it.

loose_threads:
New NPC Maximus Dickus Gets the Artifact. Artifact is The Chronos Shard
Wondrous Item, Artifact (Requires Attunement)

The Chronos Shard appears as a palm-sized, perfectly smooth obsidian tetrahedron, shimmering with an inner light that subtly shifts through the colors of a sunset. Upon closer inspection, intricate, almost imperceptible glyphs can be seen coiling across its surface, occasionally rearranging themselves as if alive. This relic is a fragment of a primordial engine of creation, touc

mission_title: The Sweep of the Sanctum Quarter
